text:
Once upon a time, there was a young cub Scout named Jamie who loved adventure. On a sunny Saturday, Jamie's Troop decided to have a hike through the woods behind their Scout camp. The woods were filled with chirping birds, buzzing bees, and the distant echo of a babbling brook. Jamie's eyes widened as he spotted a small sparkling stream that seemed to glow under the sun's rays.

Excited, Jamie raced ahead of his brothers and sisters. He climbed over fallen logs, slid down slippery rocks, and even found time to pose heroically in a bush. As he traced narrow paths, he came across a small clearing with ancient trees that seemed to whisper secrets of an old forest. He thought it was the most magical place he had ever seen.

With the help of his brother, Dan, Jamie called the group over. They sat down on a blanket they'd found and regaled each other with tales of mythical places they’d only dreamed of. Just as they were
